upgrade_source: Wikipedia (Crown Heights-Utica Avenue station); MTA records
notes: Station is ADA accessible via elevator on north side of Eastern Parkway west of Utica Ave. Two narrow staircases and one elevator connect both platforms to a small upper level mezzanine. Station renovated under 1980-1984 capital plan ($106M UMTA grant in October 1983 for 11 stations including Utica Ave), and again under 1993 capital funding. Exact year of elevator installation is not documented in available sources. Likely installed during 1990s renovations but specific date unverifiable. [CONFIDENCE: LOW]
